emotional_tone: Clean, authoritative, minimal, tactile, and highly interactive.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Use asymmetric bento grids (Mode A: Tetris Grid) for product showcases. Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 for dynamic tension.

interaction_and_motion.electrical_cables: Use framer-motion <svg><motion.path> with pathLength tied to scroll progress. A continuous 'cable' (stroke: #0A192F, strokeWidth: 3) should weave between sections, acting as the connecting thread.
interaction_and_motion.switchboard_toggle: Create a tactile UI switch using CSS. When clicked, toggle the section background between #F8F9FA (Retail) and #0A192F (Wholesale) with a smooth framer-motion layout transition. Ensure text color contrasts properly on both states.
interaction_and_motion.led_tubelight_reveal: A long, thin horizontal div (the tubelight) in a dark section. Use framer-motion whileInView to animate opacity from 0.2 to 1 and add `box-shadow: 0 0 40px 10px rgba(251,191,36,0.3)`. This 'turns on' the light, illuminating the product text beneath it.
interaction_and_motion.socket_connection: Footer contact section designed like a wall socket. A 'Plug In' button triggers a framer-motion sequence where a cable 'plugs' into the socket, revealing dummy contact info.

sections_to_build.name: HeroSection
sections_to_build.description: Massive typography 'Powering the Modern Spaces' with animated text reveal. An SVG electrical cable drops from the top navigation, wrapping around the text and exiting bottom.
sections_to_build.layout: Centered, high negative space. Deep Navy text on Soft White background.

sections_to_build.name: SwitchboardInteractive
sections_to_build.description: Interactive section with a physical-looking CSS rocker switch. Toggling 'Retail' vs 'Wholesale' completely changes the content and background color. Retail shows interior lighting and home switches. Wholesale shows industrial spools and bulk orders.
sections_to_build.layout: Split layout. Switch on the left, dynamic content on the right.

sections_to_build.name: LEDSpecialSection
sections_to_build.description: Dark Navy background section. A CSS tubelight turns on via scroll, revealing the 'Lighting & LEDs' category showcase.

sections_to_build.name: BentoShowcase
sections_to_build.description: Asymmetric grid showing Sockets, Connectors, Switches, and Wire Categories.
sections_to_build.layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix large square and tall portrait cards.

sections_to_build.name: BrandShowcase
sections_to_build.description: Marquee of trusted electrical brands we carry.
sections_to_build.layout: Continuous slow scroll marquee using `react-fast-marquee`. Minimalist, desaturated logos.

sections_to_build.name: SocketFooter
sections_to_build.description: Contact section disguised as an electrical socket. Interactive reveal.

image_urls.description: Modern architecture lighting for retail mode.
Minimal modern light switch on white wall.
Industrial wire spool for wholesale mode.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard tailwind, framer-motion, lucide-react, react-fast-marquee, and lucide-react (if not already present).

2. BUILD CUSTOM CSS HARDWARE UI: Do not rely solely on images for the switchboard and tubelight. Build a tactile switchboard component using `div`, `border-radius`, `box-shadow` (mix of inset and drop shadows), and Framer Motion for the toggle animation.

3. SVG CABLE ANIMATION: Implement a fixed or absolute positioned SVG covering the page. Use `<motion.path>` with `style={{ pathLength: scrollYProgress }}` to animate a continuous cable connecting the sections.
4. NO MOCK PLACEHOLDERS: Use the provided `image_urls` for all images and logos. Do not use placehold.it or dummyimage.
5. DATA-TESTID: Ensure all interactive buttons, switches, and toggles have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='retail-wholesale-toggle'`).

6. COLOR CONTRAST: During the retail/wholesale background toggle (#F8F9FA to #0A192F), make sure the text color transitions to maintain APCA/WCAG contrast (dark text on light BG, light text on dark BG).
7. Create visually stunning, padding-heavy layouts. Do NOT center everything. Let asymmetry drive the design.
